apify_company_profile_items.description:
KLiCHS [klIks] is a United States audit, tax, financial advisory and consulting service firm. From local retail to multinational corporations, we serve clients in numerous industries, including but not limited to, financial, automotive, electronic, technology, distribution and real estate.

KLiCHS was established around a core of dedicated professionals with deep industry knowledge and experience that have come together to collaborate and lend their extensive know-how to serve your business with a one-stop-shop.

Our dedicated professionals are here to provide you with the tools necessary for the most time and cost effective approach to satisfy your business objectives with a full range of services.

lead_before_enrichment.description: # Houston Accounting, Texas CPA, Business Services Firm ![PKF Global Logo](https://www.pkftexas.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/PKF-Global-Logo-scaled.png) As of June 1, 2025, PKF Texas is no longer a member firm of PKF Global. To find or connect with a PKF member firm in North America or globally, visit [www.PKF.com](https://www.pkf.com/) ![PKF-Withum-BW](https://www.pkftexas.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/PKF-Withum-BW.png) PKF Texas Joins Practice with Withum, a Nationally Recognized CPA and Advisory Firm.
